falsification_rule_text: Not supported if, across the five countries: (a) FIRST-ORDER incumbent-wage protection is confirmed during high-EPL windows (acknowledged success) AND (b) SECOND-ORDER youth-unemployment elasticity with respect to EPL index is NOT positive and significant at p<0.05 OR temporary-contract share is NOT positively related to EPL at p<0.05 AND (c) THIRD-ORDER emigration + fertility effects are NOT significantly related to youth-unemployment and temporary-contract channels in mediation analysis. The high-EPL / low-youth-unemployment regime (Nordic benchmark) is the key counter-pattern; its presence in the donor region calibrates the test.
